channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DACHEPALLI] Dachepalli Publishers Clarifies Share Price Movement
item.description:
Dachepalli Publishers Limited has responded to a BSE inquiry regarding unusual movement in its share price. The company stated that as of April 11, 2026, there is no material information or event affecting its operations or performance that requires disclosure under SEBI Listing Regulations. Dachepalli Publishers attributes the share price fluctuations solely to market-driven factors, asserting that the company and its management have no connection with, control over, or role in such movements on the stock exchange platform.

  • Company clarifies unusual share price movement to BSE.
  • No undisclosed material information impacting operations.
  • Share price movement attributed purely to market forces.
  • Management denies any role or control over price fluctuations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SUNDRMBRAK] Sundaram Brake Linings factory fire leads to temporary shutdown
item.description:
🔥 Trending

A fire incident occurred at Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd's Plant I in Kariapatti, Virudhunagar, Tamil Nadu, on April 10, 2026, at approximately 9:55 PM IST. The fire was successfully controlled, and fortunately, there were no casualties or injuries. However, the affected operations at the plant will be temporarily shut down. The company is currently evaluating the extent of damage to assets and equipment, with a detailed estimate to be ascertained in due course. The assets at the affected plant are adequately insured, and the company has already informed the insurance provider, with a survey expected soon.

  • Fire incident occurred at Plant I in Virudhunagar on April 10, 2026.
  • No casualties or injuries reported from the fire incident.
  • Affected operations at the plant will be temporarily shut down.
  • Extent of damage to assets and equipment is currently being evaluated.
  • Affected plant assets are adequately insured, and an insurance claim has been initiated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNDARAM BRAKE LININGS LTD. | Category: Disruption

item.title: [PCJEWELLER] PC Jeweller converts 43.59 Cr warrants, raises ₹2,512.77 Cr
item.description:
PC Jeweller Ltd has successfully completed the conversion of 43,58,82,572 Fully Convertible Warrants into equity shares for 111 allottees, including Promoter Group entities. These warrants were part of a total of 48,08,02,500 warrants allotted via preferential placement. The conversion occurred upon receipt of the balance amount of ₹42.15 per warrant. Consequently, 4,49,19,928 warrants lapsed, and their upfront amount was forfeited. The company raised a total of ₹2,512.77 crore, representing 93% of the total allotted warrants. A Promoter Group entity, New Track Garments, consciously allowed 3 crore warrants to lapse to avoid triggering open offer obligations.

  • PC Jeweller converted 43.59 crore warrants into equity shares.
  • The conversion raised ₹2,512.77 crore for the company.
  • Approximately 4.49 crore warrants lapsed, with upfront amounts forfeited.
  • Promoter group entity allowed 3 crore warrants to lapse to avoid open offer.
  • The conversion price for the balance amount was ₹42.15 per warrant.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PC JEWELLER LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [DESCO] Desco Infratech announces change in Market Maker
item.description:
Desco Infratech Ltd. has informed about a change in its market maker. Rikhav Securities Limited resigned from the role effective April 15, 2026. Subsequently, South Gujarat Shares and Sharebrokers Limited has been appointed as the new market maker for the company, also effective April 15, 2026. This action is taken to comply with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and applicable SME Segment/Market Making Guidelines issued by BSE Limited. The company has also notified its merchant banker, Smart Horizon Capital Advisors Private Limited, who has no objection to this change.

  • Rikhav Securities Limited resigned as market maker.
  • South Gujarat Shares and Sharebrokers Limited appointed.
  • Change is effective from April 15, 2026.
  • Ensures compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Desco Infratech Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [AAATECH] AAA Technologies Empaneled by NICSI for Critical Application Security Audits
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AAA Technologies Ltd has been empaneled by National Informatics Centre Services Incorporated (NICSI) to provide Comprehensive Security Audit (CSA) services for Critical Applications. This empanelment is valid until March 31, 2029, with a potential extension of two additional years. The company will conduct security audits for critical applications of Central/State Government Organisations. Approved rates for these services range from ₹10,80,000 to ₹17,82,000 per application, depending on its size and whether it involves Aadhaar integration. The scope includes compliance testing of applications and their ICT infrastructure, adhering to industry standards like ISO27001/OWASP/NIST/CIS benchmark and Cert-IN guidelines. A tentative number of 80 critical applications are expected for CSA audit.

  • Empaneled by NICSI for critical application security audits.
  • Agreement valid until March 31, 2029, with extension option.
  • Approved rates from ₹10.8L to ₹17.82L per audit.
  • Tentative 80 critical applications for CSA audit.
  • Strengthens company's cybersecurity service offerings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AAA Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RBGUPTA] Aarcon: FY26 Deviation Statement Not Applicable; No Funds Raised
item.description:
Aarcon Facilities Ltd. announced that the Statement of Deviation or Variation under Regulation 32(1) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015 is not applicable for the half-yearly and year ended March 31, 2026. This is because the company did not raise any funds through public issue, rights issue, preferential issue, or QIP during this period.

  • Aarcon did not raise funds via public, rights, preferential issue, or QIP in FY26.
  • Consequently, the SEBI Regulation 32(1) deviation statement is not applicable.
  • This confirms no capital market fundraising activity for the period ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R.B.GUPTA FINANCIALS LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [SCBL] HMM Consultancy acquires 9.86% stake in Saptak Chem
item.description:
HMM Consultancy LLP has acquired 5,00,000 equity shares of Saptak Chem And Business Limited, representing 9.86% of the target company's total diluted share capital. The acquisition was executed through a preferential allotment on April 06, 2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • HMM Consultancy LLP acquired 5,00,000 equity shares.
  • This represents 9.86% of Saptak Chem's diluted share capital.
  • The acquisition was made via preferential allotment.
  • The transaction date was April 06, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saptak Chem And Business Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [VARDMNPOLY] Vardhman Polytex Promoters Pledge Shares & Warrants to Catalyst Trusteeship
item.description:
Vardhman Polytex Ltd. (VPL) has disclosed that its Promoters and Promoter Group have created a pledge and Non-Disposal Undertaking (NDU) on their shareholding and warrants. This encumbrance, made in favor of Catalyst Trusteeship Limited (Debenture Trustee for VPL's debentures), was reported on April 10, 2026, under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The pledge was created on April 07, 2026, and involves several promoter entities including Adish Oswal, Manju Oswal, Rakhi Oswal, Abhinav Oswal, Aketa Oswal, and various investment companies/HUFs. The filing details the specific number of shares encumbered by each promoter, representing a percentage of the total share capital.

  • Vardhman Polytex promoters pledged shares and warrants.
  • Pledge created in favor of Catalyst Trusteeship Limited.
  • The encumbrance secures debentures issued by the company.
  • Multiple promoter entities are involved in the share pledge.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover Regulations on April 10, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN POLYTEX LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [CMSINFO] ICICI Pru MF cuts CMS Info Systems stake by 2.06% to 3.23%
item.description:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund (including iSIF under its various schemes) has disclosed a significant reduction in its shareholding in CMS Info Systems Ltd. The fund sold a net of 3,378,195 equity shares of the company between September 04, 2025, and April 09, 2026, through open market transactions. This sale decreased their total stake from 5.29% (8,700,858 shares) to 3.23% (5,322,663 shares) of the company's paid-up capital. The reduction of more than 2% triggered the disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund clarified that its holding is for investment purposes and not to seek controlling interest.

  • ICICI Prudential MF sold 3,378,195 shares of CMS Info Systems.
  • Their stake decreased from 5.29% to 3.23% of the company.
  • The net sale reduced holding by over 2% of paid-up capital.
  • Sale occurred between September 2025 and April 2026 via open market.
  • The fund holds shares for investment, not for control.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CMS Info Systems Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ELGIEQUIP] Pari Washington India Master Fund Sells 9,440 Elgi Equipments Shares
item.description:
Pari Washington India Master Fund Ltd, along with Pari Washington Investment Fund (PAC), sold 9,440 equity shares of Elgi Equipments Limited through an open market transaction on April 8, 2026. This disposal reduced their total shareholding in Elgi Equipments from 16,403,947 shares (5.18%) to 16,394,507 shares (5.17%). The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Pari Washington India Master Fund sold 9,440 shares of Elgi Equipments Limited.
  • The shares were sold through an open market transaction on April 8, 2026.
  • The fund's holding decreased from 5.18% to 5.17% post-sale.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELGI EQUIPMENTS LTD. | Category: Shareholding
